option.name: --init
tip: Initialize a TypeScript project and create a tsconfig.json file.

option.name: --listFilesOnly
tip: Print names of files that are part of the compilation and then stop processing.

option.name: --locale
tip: Set the language of the messaging from TypeScript.

option.name: --project
tip: Compile the project given the path to its configuration file, or to a folder with a 'tsconfig.json'.

option.name: --showConfig
tip: Print the final configuration instead of building.

global_option.name: --help
tip: Gives local information for help on the CLI.
